# Workflow Status

## Active Workflows
- ci.yml: Run tests on push ✅
- label-pr.yml: Auto-label PRs ✅
- merge-forward-skills.yml: Merge skill branches ✅

## Removed
- bump-version.yml (requires GitHub App credentials)
- update-tokens.yml (requires GitHub App credentials)
- fork-sync-skills.yml (requires GitHub App credentials)

These can be re-enabled if GitHub App is set up.
